query_normalized: systematic assessment of non-coding variant effects on transcription factor binding affinities biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it employs biophysical models to study the sequence evolution of transcription factor binding sites, directly addressing the mechanism of how non-coding variants (point mutations) affect binding affinities and the resulting fitness landscapes.
